name: Nam Phrik Kaeng Khua (Kaeng Khua Curry Paste) Ett
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried chilies in hot water for 15 minutes and remove the seeds.
2. Place all ingredients except the shrimp paste into a blender.
3. Blend until well mixed.
4. Add the shrimp paste and blend once more to create a fine-textured paste, about 3/4 cup.
5. Store in a glass jar in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 months.
